channel.description: Processes and Priorities Process a unit for provisioning system resources. any program, application, or command that runs on the system. created in memory when a program, application, or command is initiated. organized in a hierarchical fashion. Each process has a parent process (a.k.a. a calling process) that spawns it. A single parent process may have one or many child processes passes many of its attributes to them at the time of their creation.
